name: second-mortgage-private-second-lender-mix
rationale: 2nd mortgage scenario: existing 1st with RBC bank-lender + new 2nd request from private lender (Centum Private Capital). F1.EL must distinguish 1st-mortgage-lender from new-2nd-lender; PNW Statement (Personal Net Worth) typically has the existing 1st context per R4-RESIDUAL-2. If Vienna's existing-first-mortgage extraction has unresolved cases for private-second scenarios, surfaces as Layer 3 carry-forward candidate.
notes: Single-event sequence. R4-RESIDUAL-2 carry-forward watch — Phase 5 reveals whether deferred residual is still in-scope.
